name: Mikobeaute International Co., Ltd.
summary: Mikobeaute International Co., Ltd. researches and develops, and sells beauty and skin care products in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers its products under the EDN, NU+ derma, L'HERBOFLORE, and MIKOBEAUT√É¬â SPA brand names. It also operates skin care beauty therapy center. Mikobeaute International Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
